name: Blue Water Acquisition Corp. III
business: Blue Water Acquisition Corp. III is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of December 31, 2025, the company has not commenced any operations and has not selected any specific business combination target. The company expects to focus on biotechnology, healthcare and technology companies.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry but expect to focus on biotechnology, healthcare and technology companies.
